title: calliandra haematomma var. colletioides
intro: Calliandra haematomma var. colletioides, also known as the Fire Bush or Red Powder Puff, is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its vibrant red flowers and dense foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calliandra haematomma var. colletioides include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, and the extract can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
